code:
import io
import string
import list

fn read_byte(_ line: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn try_push(_ nums: List<Int>, _ line: String, _ start: Int, _ stop: Int) -> List<Int>
  let tok = string.substring(line, start, stop)
  match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(v)
    list.push(nums, v)
  when None
    nums
  end
end

fn get_at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match list.get(xs, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
mut start = -1

while i < n
  let b = read_byte(line, i)
  if is_ws(b)
    if start >= 0
      nums = try_push(nums, line, start, i)
      start = -1
    end
  else
    if start < 0
      start = i
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if start >= 0
  nums = try_push(nums, line, start, n)
end

mut sorted: List<Int> = []
for x in nums
  mut new_list: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  for y in sorted
    if not inserted and x <= y
      new_list = list.push(new_list, x)
      inserted = true
    end
    new_list = list.push(new_list, y)
  end
  if not inserted
    new_list = list.push(new_list, x)
  end
  sorted = new_list
end

let count = list.len(sorted)
mut out = ""
mut k = 0
while k < count
  let v = get_at(sorted, k)
  if k == 0
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  k = k + 1
end
println(out)
